published_prior_art.cite: rolland2022score establishes the leaf identity, not the mirror-path C_m-to-Chernoff expansion.
chernoff1952measure supplies the generic fixed-pair exponent, not its derivation as a SCORE-gap frontier for this ANM experiment.
hoyer2008nonlinear and peters2014anm identify the exceptional linear-Gaussian boundary qualitatively, not this pointwise local minimax limit.
hoyer2008nonlinear and peters2014anm establish linear-Gaussian reversibility.
zhu2023sample gives a SCORE correctness guarantee but does not analyze this cross-fitted centered diagonal-Jacobian variance contrast.
koehler2023efficiency studies score-matching versus likelihood efficiency for density estimation, not tilted-loss control for causal-order training maps.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: prop:score-contrast-template / ass:jacobian-estimability
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The common hypothesis-independent nuisance-training map and its uniform L4 rate are maintained rather than derived.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Conditional on ass:jacobian-estimability, n C_m(delta_n)→∞, and r_n=o(sqrt(C_m(delta_n))), the specified cross-fitted template is sign-consistent; no exponent claim is made.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a worked quadratic or bounded-sigmoid mechanism that computes c_1, c_2, C_m(delta), and the resulting local error limit explicitly.

Promote the tilted-loss open question into a concrete theorem only after naming one implementable score/Jacobian learner and proving primitive sufficient conditions for its returned-function sigma-field.
Add the NeurIPS 2023 score-matching robustness paper to related work and state explicitly why robustness-to-assumption-violation results do not supply a local likelihood modulus.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the accepted conditional nuisance-estimability scope fixed; retain the project as a field-tier local-information result rather than a generic SCORE efficiency claim.
